{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = The Thousand Blood Elixir
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Thousand Blood Elixir]] is distilled from a thousand powerful [[sacred beasts]] to allow a [[Sage]] to match a [[Herald]]'s strength temporarily.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“The Thousand Blood Elixir,” Lindon introduced. “Distilled from a thousand of the most physically powerful sacred beasts, condensed and refined to let a Sage artificially match a Herald in strength.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
